category: 商业生产级信息图-G4动态化
source: G4-04 动态化扩展演化结晶

color_palette.description: 动态: 深色#0F0F1E+橙#FA9960 CTA+红#E04F5F紧迫

prompt_keywords: motion hint, animated arrow, pulsing glow, countdown timer, particle drift, dynamic light streaks
style_constraint_cn: 动态行动卡: 动态暗示+脉冲CTA+紧迫徽章
style_constraint_en: Motion action card ONLY. Dynamic hints with pulsing CTA.
meta_prompt: motion action card, single centered card, animated arrow pointing to CTA, pulsing glow button, countdown timer, particle drift, dark #0F0F1E background, orange #FA9960 CTA. --ar 9:16 --s 300 --style raw --motion hint
